_comment: Shared golden matrix. Goldens are extracted from real ESPHome codegen output (data/gen-goldens.py reads the generated main.cpp); the WASM engine is asserted against them by app/test/glyphs.test.js. Fonts are ESPHome's own cached TTFs (.esphome/font), so the engine renders byte-identical input. Glyph set H G @ 1 W and the codepoints come from the oracle itself.
